title: Dactylis obtusifolia
taxonomy: Dactylis obtusifolia is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Dactylis, which includes several other species of grass. The genus Dactylis is classified under the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. The subfamily Pooideae is part of the family Poaceae, which is one of the largest and most widespread families of flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and evolutionary relationships.
uses: Dactylis obtusifolia, also known as prickly couch grass, is a plant with potential medicinal uses. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
